invalidation.zh: 资金费率Z-Score回升至-50%以上（空头压力缓解）或价格跌破3000关键心理支撑。
invalidation.en: Funding rate Z-Score recovers above -50% (short pressure eases) or price breaks below 3000 key psychological support.

invalidation.zh: 价格跌破0.134（基于ATR 0.0024设置）或资金费率Z-Score跌破50%（多头压力显著缓解）。
invalidation.en: Price breaks below 0.134 (based on ATR 0.0024) or funding rate Z-Score falls below 50% (long pressure significantly eases).

invalidation.zh: 资金费率Z-Score跌破50%（多头压力缓解）或价格跌破870（基于ATR 10.66设置，约-3%止损）。
invalidation.en: Funding rate Z-Score falls below 50% (long pressure eases) or price breaks below 870 (based on ATR 10.66, ~-3% stop loss).
